import os, numpy as np, math, json
os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')
import habitat, habitat_sim
from habitat.config.default import get_config
from habitat.config import read_write

cfg_path = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/habitat-lab/habitat/config/benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml"
config = get_config(cfg_path)
with read_write(config):
    config.habitat.simulator.scene_dataset = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/hab3_bench_assets/hab3-hssd/hab3-hssd.scene_dataset_config.json"
    config.habitat.dataset.scenes_dir = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/scene_datasets"
    config.habitat.dataset.split = "val"

env = habitat.Env(config=config)
env.seed(42)

print("=== ACTION SPACE ===")
print(env.action_space)
print("=== SPACE sample ===")
sample_act = env.action_space.sample()
print(sample_act)

obs = env.reset()
agent_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
start_pos = np.array(agent_state.position)
start_quat = agent_state.rotation
print(f"\nStart pos: {start_pos}")
print(f"Start quat: x={start_quat.x:.6f}, y={start_quat.y:.6f}, z={start_quat.z:.6f}, w={start_quat.w:.6f}")
print(f"GPS compass start: {obs['agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass']}")
print(f"Localization start: {obs['agent_0_localization_sensor']}")

# Use sample action for 5 steps
for i in range(5):
    obs = env.step(sample_act)
    agent_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
    pos = np.array(agent_state.position)
    delta = pos - start_pos
    rot = agent_state.rotation
    print(f"Step {i+1}: pos={pos}, delta={delta}, quat=({rot.x:.6f},{rot.y:.6f},{rot.z:.6f},{rot.w:.6f})")
    print(f"  localization: {obs['agent_0_localization_sensor']}")
    print(f"  gps_compass: {obs['agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass']}")
    print(f"  other_agent_gps: {obs['agent_0_other_agent_gps']}")
    if env.episode_over:
        print("Episode over")
        break

# Also test the tuple-action format once more, printed action_args keys
print("\n=== Testing default action format with explicit keys ===")
obs = env.reset()
vel = np.array([0.5, 0.2], dtype=np.float32)
action = {
    "action": ("agent_0_base_velocity", "agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action"),
    "action_args": {
        "agent_0_base_vel": vel,
        "agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action": np.array([1.0], dtype=np.float32),
    },
}
print("Action dict:", action)
agent_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
start_pos2 = np.array(agent_state.position)
for i in range(5):
    obs = env.step(action)
    agent_state = env.sim.get_agent(0).state
    pos = np.array(agent_state.position)
    delta = pos - start_pos2
    print(f"Step {i+1}: pos={pos}, delta={delta}, quat=({agent_state.rotation.x:.6f},{agent_state.rotation.y:.6f},{agent_state.rotation.z:.6f},{agent_state.rotation.w:.6f})")
    if env.episode_over:
        break

env.close()
